name: Persimmon Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir baking soda into the persimmon pulp and set aside.
2. Cream butter and sugar together.
3. Beat in egg, then stir in the persimmon mixture.
4. Sift flour with baking powder, salt, cinnamon, cloves, and nutmeg.
5. Add to the creamed mixture along with raisins or nuts.
6. Mix thoroughly.
7. Drop by teaspoons onto greased baking sheets.
8. Bake at 350°F for 8 to 10 minutes.
